title: Halcyon Quillfeather

Halcyon Quillfeather is the founder of Quartzbloom Systems. Halcyon pushed back on the proposed valuation during diligence.

---
title: Quartzbloom Systems
type: company
summary: Seed-stage company. Founded by Halcyon Quillfeather.
---

Quartzbloom Systems is a seed-stage company. Founded by Halcyon Quillfeather. The seed conversation started in 2025.

turns.text: Did Quillfeather ever follow up on that intro?
